audit_items.proof_trace: block_list_clear_cb delegates entirely to clear_block_list() → cache_clear(block_list, 3600). In cache_clear, the HASH_ITER macro pre-computes the next pointer (tmp) before the loop body, making in-loop deletion safe; memory is freed in correct order — data (via free_firewall_rule which frees only entry->data, not the key, or ss_free), then entry->key (while entry is still live), then entry — so no pointer is dereferenced after being freed and no double-free exists. The entire call chain executes in libev's single-threaded event loop, eliminating concurrent access concerns.
